creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The file site-packages/cloud_sptheme/themes/greencloud/theme.conf is installed with incorrect permissions and is only readable by root.

% ls -l /usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/cloud_sptheme/themes/greencloud/
total 5
-rw-------  1 root  wheel  976 Sep 25  2013 theme.conf
